note: All 13 negative/reputational themes plus the watchdog/NGO search were run via WebSearch. Results were either evergreen NGO/reference pages with no in-window publication date, or dated articles pre-window (Turki al-Jasser execution coverage June 2025; ITV NEOM documentary 2024; ILO migrant-labour complaint Mar-May 2026; Riyadh Comedy Festival backlash Sep-Oct 2025; LIV Golf funding coverage earlier/ongoing). No candidate passed the in-window date gate, so none advanced to WebFetch verification. Empty Negative Articles section is honest, not a skipped search.
